debug_info.goal:
case refine_2.refine_2
α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ Measure.map
      (fun x =>
        ((@Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg x n,
            @Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x),
          x.2
            (pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
              (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x) (n + 1) x)
            (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) x)))
      (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν) =
    (Measure.map
          (fun ω =>
            (@Bandits.ArrayModel.hist α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg ω n,
              @Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) ω))
          (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)).compProd
      (Kernel.prodMkLeft (↥(Iic n) → α × R) ν)

failed_attempts: simpa [Measure.compProd, Measure.map_map]
simpa [Measure.compProd_apply, Kernel.prodMkLeft_apply, Kernel.prod_apply] using rfl

  rfl

simpa using (Measure.compProd_apply_eq_map_prodMkLeft
    (μ := arrayMeasure ν)
    (f := fun ω ↦ (hist alg ω n, action alg (n + 1) ω))
    (κ := ν) (g := fun x ↦ x) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))

ext s hs
  simp [Measure.compProd_apply, hs]

ext s hs
  simp [Measure.compProd_apply, hs]

    Kernel.prod_apply, Kernel.id_apply, Kernel.const_apply, Measure.map_map] 
    using rfl

    (κ := Kernel.prodMkLeft (↥(Iic n) → α × R) ν))

simpa using (Measure.map_congr (μ := arrayMeasure ν) (f := fun x ↦
        ((hist alg x n, action alg (n + 1) x),
          x.2
            (pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) x) (n + 1) x)
            (action alg (n + 1) x)))
      (g := fun x ↦
        ((hist alg x n, action alg (n + 1) x),
          x.2
            (pullCount' n (hist alg x n) (action alg (n + 1) x))
            (action alg (n + 1) x)))
      (by
        filter_upwards with x
        simp [pullCount_eq_pullCount' (R' := reward alg) (by simp), Nat.add_one_sub_one,
          action_add_one_eq]))
